question_text: Which of the following describes what happens during condensation?

options.label: A
options.text: A solid turns directly into a gas without becoming a liquid.

options.label: B
options.text: A gas cools down and turns into a liquid.

options.label: C
options.text: A liquid heats up and turns into a gas.

options.label: D
options.text: A liquid cools down and turns into a solid.

explanation: Condensation is the change of state from gas to liquid, and it happens when a gas loses heat energy and cools down. You see this when water vapour in the air condenses on a cold mirror or window.
